channel.title: linux on Data Lab Tech TV
channel.description: Recent content in linux on Data Lab Tech TV

item.title: Year of the Linux Desktop #8: Niri & Noctalia on Bazzite
item.description: Today we will learn how to install and configure Niri, Noctalia, and a few other utilities on Bazzite!

item.title: Year of the Linux Desktop #7: Building a Custom Bazzite Image
item.description: Let's learn about bootc, and how to setup a custom Bazzite image!\

item.title: Year of the Linux Desktop #6: Managing Linux Configs Like a Pro
item.description: Learn how to securely manage your Linux configs with chezmoi and a git repo, so you'll never need to reconfigure or copy files over manually ever again!

item.title: Year of the Linux Desktop #5: Development in Immutable Bazzite
item.description: Learn how to install your IDE with a Flatpak, and use distrobox for your dev tooling and environment.

item.title: Year of the Linux Desktop #4: Secure Samba Mounts with systemd-creds
item.description: Learn how to use systemd-creds to encrypt your credentials using TPM2, and how to mount network resources with systemd-mount and systemd-automount.

item.title: Year of the Linux Desktop #3: Trusting Self-Signed Certs in Flatpak
item.description: On this blog post I'll show you just how to trust certificates system-wide on Bazzite, making them available to all your applications, including Flatpaks.

item.title: Year of the Linux Desktop #2: Bazzite Desktop Essentials
item.description: Wanna know how it really feels to switch to Linux? In this blog post, I talk about KDE Plasma, essential applications to manage Flatpak, and the basics of gaming in Linux.

item.title: Year of the Linux Desktop #1: I Switched to Bazzite!
item.description: Wanna know how it really feels to switch to Linux? In this blog post, I share my installation process, first impressions, some issues I encountered, and how to deal with them.
